title: Python Programming
summary: Learn Python fundamentals, practical scripting, and problem solving through structured online study.

title: Java Programming
summary: Study Java syntax, object-oriented programming, and modern application building online.

title: C / C++ Programming
summary: Build strong low-level programming skills with C and modern C++ study resources.

title: JavaScript Development
summary: Master JavaScript for web interactivity, logic, and application development.

title: Frontend Development (HTML, CSS, JS, React)
summary: Study modern frontend development from HTML and CSS foundations to React interfaces.

title: Backend Development (Node.js, PHP, Django)
summary: Learn backend APIs, server-side logic, and database-connected web services.

title: Full Stack Development
summary: Study frontend and backend development together to build complete production-ready systems.

title: Database Management
summary: Understand how databases are designed, managed, secured, and used in digital systems.

title: MySQL / SQL Databases
summary: Learn SQL querying, schema design, and relational database operations with MySQL.

title: NoSQL Databases (MongoDB)
summary: Study document databases, flexible schemas, and modern NoSQL data modeling online.

title: Cybersecurity / Ethical Hacking
summary: Explore cyber threats, defense strategies, and ethical security testing practices.

title: Network Security
summary: Learn how to protect networks, devices, and traffic in modern IT environments.

title: Computer Networking (CCNA, Routing & Switching)
summary: Study network communication, routing, switching, and troubleshooting for ICT careers.

title: Cloud Computing (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud)
summary: Learn cloud service models, deployment patterns, and major platform workflows online.

title: Mobile App Development (Flutter, Android, React Native)
summary: Build mobile apps with cross-platform and native workflows for Android and iOS ecosystems.

title: Web Development (Complete Web Systems)
summary: Study complete web systems from browser interfaces to backend-connected applications.

title: Artificial Intelligence (AI)
summary: Learn core AI concepts, practical AI services, and responsible AI design.

title: Machine Learning (ML)
summary: Study supervised learning, model evaluation, and core machine learning workflows.

title: Data Science
summary: Learn data science workflows from data preparation to modeling and interpretation.

title: Data Analysis
summary: Build practical skills in analyzing, visualizing, and communicating data insights.

title: Internet of Things (IoT)
summary: Study connected devices, sensors, messaging, and IoT solution design.

title: System Administration (Linux, Servers)
summary: Learn Linux systems, server operations, user management, and infrastructure maintenance.

title: DevOps (Docker, CI/CD, Kubernetes)
summary: Study automation, containerization, delivery pipelines, and scalable deployments.

title: Software Testing / Quality Assurance (QA)
summary: Learn software quality workflows including test design, automation, and verification practices.

title: UI/UX Design
summary: Study user-centered design, interface structure, and modern product design workflows.

title: Game Development
summary: Learn interactive game systems, assets, scripting, and publishing workflows.

title: Blockchain Technology
summary: Study decentralized systems, blockchain fundamentals, and smart contract concepts.

title: Big Data Technologies
summary: Learn distributed data processing, scalable analytics, and big data platform concepts.

title: Embedded Systems
summary: Study microcontrollers, hardware-software interaction, and real-world embedded design.

title: C# / .NET Development
summary: Master C# language fundamentals, .NET runtime features, and modern backend & desktop applications.

title: Dart & Flutter Cross-platform
summary: Use Dart to build reactive, cross-platform Flutter apps covering UI, state, and native integration.

title: PHP / Laravel & CodeIgniter
summary: Build robust PHP web services using Laravel and CodeIgniter frameworks, MVC patterns, and deployment.

title: Ruby / Ruby on Rails
summary: Learn Ruby syntax, Rails conventions, and rapid web development with MVC and RESTful APIs.

title: Go, Kotlin & Swift Fundamentals
summary: Cover Go for backend services plus Kotlin & Swift for modern Android and iOS development.

title: R & MATLAB for Data Science
summary: Use R and MATLAB for statistical analysis, modeling, visualization, and scientific computing.

title: Bash / Shell & PowerShell Scripting
summary: Automate Linux and Windows tasks with Bash/shell pipelines plus PowerShell scripting.

title: Advanced Frontend Frameworks & Design
summary: Master HTML/CSS, SASS/LESS, JS frameworks, responsive design, and Tailwind/Bootstrap systems.

title: API Design, Microservices & GraphQL
summary: Design REST/GraphQL APIs, secure them with JWT/OAuth, and architect resilient microservices.

title: Full Stack Stacks (MERN, MEAN, LAMP, JAMstack)
summary: Learn end-to-end applications using MERN/MEAN, LAMP, and JAMstack architectures.

title: Cloud Computing & DevOps
summary: Cover AWS, Azure, GCP services, serverless patterns, cloud security, and DevOps tooling integration.

title: Cybersecurity & Ethical Hacking
summary: Learn ethical hacking, penetration testing, malware analysis, cryptography, IAM, and security compliance.

title: Computer Networking & Wireless
summary: Study TCP/IP, LAN/WAN, Cisco CCNA/CCNP, wireless technologies, VPNs, and firewall deployments.

title: Software Testing & Automation
summary: Learn manual testing, Selenium/Appium automation, JUnit, CI integration, and QA tooling.

title: DevOps & Automation Tooling
summary: Cover Git, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (Jenkins/GitHub Actions/GitLab CI), Terraform/Ansible, and monitoring stacks.

title: System Administration & Virtualization
summary: Learn Linux/Windows server administration, virtualization (VMware/VirtualBox), PowerShell, Active Directory, and backup strategies.

title: Mobile App Development (Flutter, React Native, Android, iOS)
summary: Build Flutter, React Native, native Android (Kotlin) and iOS (Swift) apps with deployment pipelines.

title: Emerging Technologies (AIoT, 5G, Edge, Quantum, AR/VR, Robotics)
summary: Explore AI + IoT (AIoT), edge computing, 5G, quantum basics, AR/VR, and robotics automation.

title: Cloud Data & Analytics (Power BI, Tableau, Excel)
summary: Analyze and visualize cloud data with Power BI, Tableau, and Excel, plus connect big data tools like Hadoop/Spark.

title: Blockchain & Cryptocurrency Development
summary: Learn blockchain fundamentals, Ethereum smart contracts, DApps, wallets, tokens, and security.
